caption: A woman with black hair and glasses is centered against a plain dark grey background. She wears a light green, short-sleeved top featuring floral embroidery around the neckline and a thin black necklace. In the beginning, she is speaking with her eyes closed and her hands raised and palms touching in a gesturing motion. As the scene progresses, she opens her eyes and continues speaking, with her hands lowering and moving slightly. A small black lapel microphone is clipped to the front of her shirt. In the bottom corner of the frames, a small circular logo featuring a stylized sun and the text "NPTEL" is visible. The background and the woman's position remain constant throughout the sequence, with the only changes being her facial expressions and the movement of her hands as she talks.
